use_cases: Displaying competitor comparison metrics in dashboards
Showing product rankings or performance scores on landing pages
Presenting survey results with animated number counters
Visualizing market share or benchmark statistics
Displaying comparative analytics in business reports
ai_summary: A statistics comparison card component designed to display competitor or benchmark metrics with animated number counters and staggered entrance animations. Features a gradient background container, spring-based motion effects, and a clean minimalist design suitable for SaaS dashboards, landing pages, or analytics interfaces. The component uses NumberFlow for smooth numerical animations and Framer Motion for entrance orchestration.
